colleges.name: Shri Ramdeobaba College Of Engineering And Management

topPositiveComments.text: The sessions were truly great and impactful. Thank you Sir for sharing the immense and in-depth knowledge of the Project Management.
Great insights from the faculty introduced to some reference case study and book by
I like how sir is interacting and his knowledge about any field
It was very excellent and innovative

topCriticalComments.text:
Trainer don't have the teaching experience 
No concepts are cleared
Teaching is not appropriate 
Wasting most of the time

Trainer is not good in technical knowledge.
He is very lazy and in full day only teaches 1-2hr.

The training experience was very disappointing. The trainer’s teaching style was not effective, and concepts were often explained in a way that made them difficult to understand. There was very little interaction with students, which created an unengaging learning environment. It also felt like more attention was given to students who already had prior knowledge of the topic, while those trying to learn from scratch were not adequately supported.

A trainer should ensure that every student understands the concepts before moving ahead, but that effort seemed missing. Doubts were not handled properly, and there was little concern about whether students were actually learning or not. Training should encourage growth and confidence for everyone, not just those who already know the subject. Overall, this experience did not meet expectations and left a negative impression.
topCriticalComments.college: Shri Ramdeobaba College Of Engineering And Management

topCriticalComments.text:
The session was again disappointing. The trainer did not interact much with students or make enough effort to ensure everyone was understanding the concepts. Most attention seemed to go toward students who already knew the topic, while others were left behind.

Compared to this, the previous trainer was much better at explaining concepts, interacting with students, and making sure everyone stayed involved.
